description: Letter from Elḥanan b. Shemarya to the community of Qayrawān. In Hebrew. The content of the letter is lacking, with only the sender's title and opening blessings preserved. On verso there is the beginning of the address as well as the opening of another letter. Letter prefaced with four short lines of blessing, beginning with Psalms 119:165. No names preserved. (Information from CUL catalogue via FGP.)
description_he: מכתב בעברית מפוסטאט לקירואן. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
